name: Shopify
tagline: Ecommerce platform — orders, products, customers, inventory.
security: Verify webhook HMAC using SHOPIFY_API_SECRET — Shopify-Hmac-Sha256 header.
Use Custom App admin tokens for single-store; OAuth for multi-store apps in the App Store.
Scope API access tokens to the minimum read_/write_ permissions needed.
Rotate admin API tokens periodically — Shopify stores them in plain text once issued.

patterns.name: Order fulfillment webhook
patterns.description: Subscribe to orders/create and orders/fulfilled webhooks to drive downstream automations.

patterns.name: Inventory sync
patterns.description: Poll or subscribe to inventory_levels/update to keep external systems in sync.

patterns.name: Customer segmentation
patterns.description: Tag customers based on order history for downstream marketing tools.

triggers.name: Order created
triggers.description: Fires when a new order is placed.

triggers.name: Order fulfilled
triggers.description: Fires when an order is marked as fulfilled.

triggers.name: Order cancelled
triggers.description: Fires when an order is cancelled.

triggers.name: Customer created
triggers.description: Fires when a new customer record is created in the store.

triggers.name: Product updated
triggers.description: Fires when a product's details change.

triggers.name: Inventory low
triggers.description: Polled trigger — fires when a SKU drops below a threshold.

actions.name: Update order
actions.description: Update properties of an existing order.

actions.name: Cancel order
actions.description: Cancel an order and optionally refund.

actions.name: Create product
actions.description: Add a new product to the catalog.

actions.name: Update inventory level
actions.description: Adjust the inventory count for a specific SKU/location.

auth.description: Admin API access token (Custom App). Single-store.
OAuth 2.0 for multi-store apps distributed via the Shopify App Store.
API secret used to verify HMAC signatures on incoming webhooks.
